reasoning_model_1: The user requested the model to say a specific sentence: '这个……答案……好像……不对。' with an intermittent rhythm. However, Model 1 completely failed to follow the text script. Instead of the required text, it generated a long, conversational paragraph: '好像不对，这个答案确实不太对。你是不是想再确认一下？...'. Because the content is completely inconsistent with the script and creates a hallucinated response, the model receives a score of 0 according to the scoring standard.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 followed the text script '这个……答案……好像……不对。' perfectly with no errors. Regarding the paralinguistic requirement '断断续续的节奏' (intermittent rhythm), the model executed this very effectively. It placed distinct, heavy pauses between almost every syllable ('这……个……答……案……'), creating a staccato, hesitant effect that perfectly aligns with the prompt's description and the ellipses in the text. The rhythm accurately reflects the requested feature.
model_comparison: There is a stark difference in performance. Model 1 failed the most basic requirement of Content Accuracy, generating a completely different conversational response instead of reading the specific text provided. Therefore, it failed to demonstrate the requested rhythm on the target text. Model 2, on the other hand, strictly adhered to the text and successfully implemented the 'intermittent' rhythm by pausing deliberately between characters/words. Model 2 is the clear winner as it is the only one that followed the instructions.
